title: Kiln run event — one line of .kiln/events.jsonl
description: Append-only write-ahead source of truth for a Kiln run (BLUEPRINT §4). state.json is a deterministic projection of these events. Cross-line invariants enforced by kiln-state.mjs validate, not expressible here: seq is contiguous starting at 1; events appear in seq order. A truncated final line is structural partial-write recovery — dropped with a warning, never a violation.

seq.description: 1-based ledger position, contiguous across the file; assigned by kiln-state.mjs append

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp, assigned by kiln-state.mjs append from the system clock

type.description: Projection folds unknown types into nothing without erroring (forward compat), but validate holds the ledger to this enum

stage.description: Pipeline stage the event belongs to (onboarding|brainstorm|gauge|research|architecture|build|validate|report, or finer-grained labels later phases introduce)

data.description: Event payload — the extension point. Well-known keys the projection folds from any KNOWN event type (unknown types fold into nothing): capability (replaces), milestones/counters/paths (shallow-merge). posture_set/posture_escalated carry the posture object in data.posture; run_init carries data.project

git.description: Commit SHA anchor (gate events carry one so resume never re-runs a gate whose commit exists), or null
